Notice Of Motion And Motion Re Arbitration; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion Re Arbitration
Off Calendar Oct-30-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF VIVIAN SU's Motion Re Arbitration is DENIED in part and moot in part. Motion to vacate order compelling arbitration is denied; motion to appoint and arbitration is denied, moot, parties have agreed on an arbitrator. Arbitration to proceed in January 2019 on the date(s) provided by the arbitrator. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported (D501)

Off Calendar Aug-17-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Attorney Michael Fluetsch for Defendants Arthur Keown & Wendy Keown the moving party.
Attorney Walter Shjeflo for Plantiff Vivian Su the opposing party.
Attorney Shelley A. Moineaux for Defendants Keller Williams Realty, Inc. & Pablo Cela the opposing parties.

After hearing arguments from all parties in the matter of DEFENDANT ARTHUR KEOWN, WENDY KEOWN MOTION FOR DETERMINATION OF GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT, ETC. the Court takes this matter under submission. Proposed orders are to be emailed to Department 501's LRA, O. Grecova.
